# Requirement: FR-002

- Title: Schema-backed consultant project listing
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall render a projects section with schema-validated cards displaying title, business problem, delivered solution, and observed outcome from repository-local content records.

## Rationale

Without a stable projects module, early-stage portfolio proof can appear weak or inconsistent, reducing trust with prospective clients evaluating consultant credibility.

## Acceptance Conditions

- Projects section renders cards from repository-local content records.
- Each card includes title, business problem, delivered solution, and observed outcome in short format.
- Cards support early-stage portfolio reality and do not require inflated case-study depth.
- Invalid project records fail schema validation and block merge.

## Success Metrics

- All project records validate against schema and render without runtime errors in CI.
- At least 2 project records are published in Phase 1.

## Non-Goals

- Advanced filtering/search UI, external CMS ingestion.

## Constraints

- Static build output, schema-first contract enforcement, additive-only contract changes unless ICR approved.
